# mem0-mcp

> A FastMCP HTTP server wrapping mem0ai and a local Qdrant vector store, exposing add/search/list/delete memory tools over the Model Context Protocol. Python 3.11, shipped as a Docker image.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): project overview, Docker quickstart, configuration, and architecture
- [Contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): local setup, test and build commands, PR checklist
- [Security policy](SECURITY.md): how to report vulnerabilities
- [Claude Code project conventions](CLAUDE.md): coding conventions, required skills, engineering principles

## Examples

- [docker-compose.yml](docker-compose.yml): Qdrant + MCP server, bound to 127.0.0.1:8888
- [MCP server source](app/server.py): FastMCP tool definitions (add_memory, search_memory, list_memories, delete_memory)

## Optional
